title: Monthly Plan vs Annual Contract
description: Compare flexibility and savings when choosing business phone billing terms.
winnerSummary: Monthly plans preserve flexibility, while annual contracts may lower unit pricing if you are confident in the provider.
bestForB: Teams confident in provider fit and seat count.
costConsiderations: Compare total term price, cancellation terms, implementation fees, and unused seats.

faqs.question: Should I sign a long phone contract?
faqs.answer: Only after verifying features, support, pricing, taxes, and cancellation terms.
